description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages smoke-test, build, test, and benchmark using the default Docker image. In the smoke-test stage add a compile job that runs echo -e '\033[36mValidating Lua syntax\033[0m' then make compile, and a lint job that allows failure, runs echo -e '\033[36mPerforming static analysis\033[0m' then make lint. In the test stage add a test job that runs echo -e '\033[36mRunning tests\033[0m' then make test. In the benchmark stage add a benchmark job that caches battleground/, creates an artifact named benchmark_results_${CI_COMMIT_SHA} from benchmark_results.json, runs echo -e '\033[36mPerforming benchmarks\033[0m' then make benchmark, and a benchmark-foreign job that also caches battleground/, creates an artifact benchmark_results_f_${CI_COMMIT_SHA} from benchmark_results_f.json, runs echo -e '\033[36mPerforming foreign benchmarks\033[0m' then make benchmark-foreign. Finally add a wipe_cache job in the benchmark stage that runs on failure and executes rm -r battleground.
